name: Screen Capture Activity
description: Detects screen capture tools or API calls that may indicate data collection
query:
// Screen Capture Detection
// Screenshot tools or APIs
events from endpoint
where process_name in ("snippingtool.exe", "screencapture", "screenshot")
  or command_line contains "screenshot"
  or api_call contains "CaptureScreen"
group by hostname, username
having count(*) > 10
within 300 seconds
